response.original_title: How to Cancel Norton Subscription and Get Refund? {{Instant~Guide}}
response.overview: To cancel your Norton subscription and get a refund, 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 first log into your Norton account through a web browser and navigate to the "Subscriptions" or "My Billing" page, 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 look for a "Turn Off Auto-Renewal" or "Cancel Subscription" button, and if found, click it and confirm your cancellation, saving a screenshot as proof, 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 however, many users report that this online button is missing or grayed out, forcing them to call Norton support directly at 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 to cancel, 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 when you call, be prepared for long wait times, often 20 to 40 minutes, and possible transfers between departments, 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 once you reach an agent, clearly state that you want to cancel your subscription immediately and also request a refund if you are within Norton's 60-day money-back guarantee period, 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 the agent may try to keep you as a customer by offering discounts or free months,
response.title: How to Cancel Norton Subscription and Get Refund? {{Instant~Guide}}
